mapper.sql: book_no, book_name, book_coverimg, book_date, book_price, book_publisher, book_info
mapper.insert:
SELECT book_seq.nextval FROM dual
INSERT INTO book_tbl_06( ) VALUES(#{bookNo}, #{bookName}, #{bookCoverimg}, #{bookDate}, #{bookPrice}, #{bookPublisher}, #{bookInfo} )
mapper.select: select r.book_no, b.book_name, sum(r.rent_price) rent_price, count(r.book_no) rent_status from book_tbl_06 b join RENT_TBL_06 r on b.book_no = r.book_no group by r.book_no, b.book_name
